title: Revenue by client (3-year breakdown)
description: Pull revenue per client for last 36 months; identify concentration and seasonality.

title: Top-10 client concentration analysis
description: % of revenue from top-1, top-5, top-10 clients across last 3 years.

title: Client retention / churn analysis
description: Annual logo retention, net revenue retention, and churn reasons.

title: Gross margin by service line
description: Split revenue & direct cost by service line (bookkeeping, tax, advisory, CAS).

title: 3-year P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow
description: Audited or compiled statements, plus monthly trailing 12 for current year.

title: AR aging + bad-debt history
description: Current AR aging plus last 3 years of write-offs and collection patterns.

title: AP aging + payment terms
description: Open AP, typical terms, any past-due vendor balances.

title: Debt schedule + covenants
description: All outstanding debt, rates, terms, covenants, and security.

title: Working capital peg
description: Rolling average NWC used to set the deal peg.

title: Staff roster: roles, tenure, comp
description: Full employee list with titles, hire dates, base, bonus, equity, benefits.

title: Compensation structure & benchmarks
description: Base vs. variable split, commission plans, retention bonuses, severance.

title: Partner / owner comp & distributions
description: Owner add-backs, draws, perks to normalize EBITDA.

title: Key-person dependencies
description: Identify individuals who hold critical client relationships or IP.

title: Org chart + reporting lines
description: Current structure and any planned changes.

title: Utilization & capacity analysis
description: Billable-hour utilization, realization %, unbilled WIP.

title: Service delivery processes / SOPs
description: Documented workflows, bottlenecks, dependencies.

title: Tech stack audit
description: All software, versions, license counts, annual cost, owner, renewal dates.

title: Data architecture & integrations
description: Data stores, flow between systems, API surface, custom integrations.

title: Cybersecurity posture
description: Controls, MFA coverage, EDR, backups, past incidents.

title: Client portal / proprietary tooling
description: In-house apps, ownership, maintenance burden.

title: Pending / threatened litigation
description: All open matters, reserves, plus prior claims history.

title: Professional liability / E&O coverage
description: Policy limits, deductibles, claims history, tail options.

title: Employment disputes & settlements
description: Claims, PIPs, separation agreements, restrictive covenants enforced.

title: Regulatory / PCAOB / state-board matters
description: Any open inquiries, consent orders, peer review findings.

title: IP ownership & work-for-hire
description: Assignments signed by every employee; IP created outside employment.

title: NDAs, non-competes, non-solicits
description: Coverage of key employees, enforceability by state.

title: Client contract review (top 20)
description: Term, auto-renew, change-of-control, SLAs, fee schedule, termination.

title: Change-of-control consents required
description: Flag clients and vendors requiring consent for transaction.

title: Pricing & proposal process
description: Standard rates, discounting authority, quote-to-close metrics.

title: Pipeline & sales forecast
description: Active opportunities, weighted pipeline, win rates, cycle times.

title: Lease obligations & terms
description: All leases, square footage, rent, escalators, renewal options, exit costs.

title: Remote / hybrid policy
description: Current in-office requirement and any upcoming changes.

title: Benefits obligations (health, 401k, PTO)
description: Plan documents, employer match, accrued PTO liability.

title: Employee handbook & policies
description: Current version, last legal review, state-specific addenda.

title: Payroll tax compliance
description: 941 filings, state SUI/SIT, 1099 vs. W-2 classification review.

title: Federal & state tax filings (3 years)
description: All returns, extensions, open audits, carryforwards.

title: Sales / use / franchise tax nexus review
description: States where nexus established, compliance status, exposure.

title: Day-1 / Day-30 / Day-100 plan
description: Who owns what, retention bonuses, client communication plan.

title: Synergy model (cost + revenue)
description: Quantified synergies with owners and timing.

title: Cultural fit / values alignment
description: Leadership interviews, values survey, red flags.
